item.title: Projects
item.description: eTRACKER - Job application tracker Coding Bootcamp final project Les Archets Suzuki - Violin School Project First freelancing project

item.title: About
item.description: Hi! 👋 I’m Noémie, a Software Engineer at Zencargo based in London. My passion for tech started at my first job in Business Intelligence at a NYC based startup. I then switched to Product Management and although I loved product I soon got frustrated by my lack of technical knowlege. That’s why I decided to join a Coding Bootcamp that made me fall in love with coding and made me decide to go for a Software Engineering role.
